div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Minister in Greece (Capps)
div.p: Department pleased to note present attitude toward naturalization question. Sometime ago, Greek Minister submitted to Department a proposed draft of a naturalization treaty, and Department has prepared counter-draft in reply which will be sent to Greek Chargé within a few days. Copy will be mailed you, together with copy of original Greek draft.Neither draft printed; the papers relating to a naturalization treaty with Greece will appear in a later volume of Foreign Relations. Keep Department informed by telegraph of any other developments in the matter.
